author: doll-agent
content: ferrolearn-metrics audit COMPLETE. Wired orphans (#302). Added 13 classification metrics (#303), 4 clustering metrics (#304), 3 pairwise items (#305). api_proof.rs (#309) covers all public API with 8 tests. Deferred: #306 (d2_* family), #307 (ranking edge cases coverage_error/label_ranking_*), #308 (scorer registry get_scorer/get_scorer_names + DistanceMetric trait). 197 metrics tests pass, full workspace builds clean, clippy clean, fmt clean.
